name: claude-skills
description: Ian Lawrence personal skill library for investment analysis, deal intelligence, and strategic research

plugins.name: analytical-operating-system
plugins.description: Universal investment analysis framework: thesis-first reasoning, MECE structure, Bayesian updating, evidence standards [F/E/H], and action bias.

plugins.name: boundability
plugins.description: Assess which investment risks are bounded, partially bounded, or unbounded. Two-layer framework: driver tree tiers + six-module issue assessment.

plugins.name: claim-scrutinizer
plugins.description: Analyzes investment memos for structural gaps, unsupported claims, and logic errors. Seven-part test per material claim.

plugins.name: competitive-landscape-deliverable
plugins.description: Transforms a competitor spreadsheet into a formatted competitive landscape deliverable.

plugins.name: competitive-moat-assessment
plugins.description: Build a rigorous moat verdict per named competitor. Five moat types, existence-to-durability framework.

plugins.name: deal-master
plugins.description: Single entry point for all deal intelligence. Inventories existing research, loads context, and routes to the right phase.

plugins.name: deck-check
plugins.description: Review and audit presentation decks for structure, clarity, and completeness.

plugins.name: deck-refresh
plugins.description: Refresh and update existing presentation decks with new content.

plugins.name: diligence-ddr
plugins.description: Generate a comprehensive Data Room Request tailored to the company and deal context.

plugins.name: doc-quality-checker
plugins.description: Quality and formatting check on Pattern-branded documents. Flags CRITICAL issues before distribution.

plugins.name: driver-tree
plugins.description: Decomposes investment theses into MECE causal trees mapped to NTBs and MOIC.

plugins.name: executive-briefing
plugins.description: Transform research findings into executive-ready briefings for C-suite or board audiences.

plugins.name: executive-summary-writer
plugins.description: Write a publication-ready executive summary from a completed IC memo or research report.

plugins.name: finance-metrics-quickref
plugins.description: Look up SaaS finance metrics, formulas, and benchmarks instantly during analysis.

plugins.name: financial-model-builder
plugins.description: Build a 3-tab operating model from source P&L or financial data. Requires data room access.

plugins.name: giving-presentations
plugins.description: Guidance on delivering effective presentations.

plugins.name: gtm-metrics-analyzer
plugins.description: Calculate and package 48 GTM metrics across 6 families. Requires company metrics data.

plugins.name: ic-memo
plugins.description: Write a structured Investment Committee memo. 10-section structure with NTB registry and disaggregation table.

plugins.name: kpi-tree-builder
plugins.description: Build and audit company-specific KPI trees and management plan credibility assessments.

plugins.name: managing-up
plugins.description: Framework for managing up effectively in a corporate environment.

plugins.name: market-research
plugins.description: Execute professional-grade market research: L4 market context, L3 customer insights, L2 competitive landscape.

plugins.name: mckinsey-consultant
plugins.description: McKinsey-level structured consulting: issue trees, hypothesis-driven analysis, Six Screening Questions.

plugins.name: ntb-diligence
plugins.description: 4-phase Need-to-Believe quality check with MOIC sum tolerance enforcement.

plugins.name: pattern-docx
plugins.description: Generate on-brand Word documents using the Pattern template.

plugins.name: pattern-investment-pptx
plugins.description: Generate on-brand investment-grade PowerPoint decks in Pattern IC deck format.

plugins.name: pre-mortem
plugins.description: 10-category failure taxonomy, compound failure paths, IC-facing risk narrative.

plugins.name: red-team
plugins.description: Adversarial stress-test: attack vectors, kill scenarios, bear case, adversarial scorecard.

plugins.name: skill-authoring-workflow
plugins.description: Workflow for creating new skills following best practices.

plugins.name: statistics-fundamentals
plugins.description: Core statistics concepts and their application in business analysis.

plugins.name: tam-sam-som-calculator
plugins.description: Size a market with top-down and bottom-up methodologies. Validates divergence, Year 1-3 projections.

plugins.name: vibe-coding
plugins.description: Rapid prototyping and code generation workflow.

plugins.name: writing-style
plugins.description: Governs prose quality, claim standards, and epistemic tagging [F/E/H].

plugins.name: written-communication
plugins.description: Best practices for professional written communication.
